name: Arlitech Electronic Corp.
summary: Arlitech Electronic Corp. supplies inductors for LCD panel industry in Taiwan. It offers high current power, SMD power, DIP power, and RF inductors, as well as automotive grade and EMI suppression filters. The company also provides business items; cooling materials, such as graphene papers, thermal conductivity die-casting aluminum alloy, and graphene coating; and thermal solution designs. Its products are used in the display panel, network, industrial, entertainment, storage device, and computer applications. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
